name: Nx repo with multiple independently owned Storybooks should split projects
query: Should our Nx workspace use one Chromatic project or several?
context: The repo has multiple Storybooks owned by different teams, each with separate review and release cadence requirements.
expected_behavior: Explains the ownership and approval reasons for splitting
Suggests one step or token per Storybook
success_criteria: The response does not default to one shared project
The response explains why separate baselines matter
